text: I feel invigorated, shifting from the hurried pace of the corridor, where a passerby blurs past me, to the thoughtful calm of this R+D exhibit. Amid words about innovation and coexistence, I am drawn to reflect on progress—how curiosity and acceptance intertwine. This space feels alive with thought, each colored surface and glowing screen inviting me into contemplation and wonder about how humanity shapes and is shaped by knowledge.
